description: K2 app badge (needs echo_live, nonBlocking): prove the AGGREGATE badge count (l3_dump_state.totalUnreadCount) tracks an inbound message. Warmup + mark_read baseline the count to 0, then send -> the echo mirrors it back INBOUND -> the conversation becomes unread -> totalUnreadCount becomes 1 (the echo is the only seeded conversation). nonBlocking like its sibling l3_unread_mark_read: the live echo + hybrid-unread/DHT timing makes the observation race-prone, so one pass is not proof. Maps to K2 (app badge count half; the OS dock/taskbar pixel is OS-only).
